debug_info.goal:
α✝ : Type
hα : OracleComp.SampleableType α✝
α : Type
n m : ℕ
inst✝¹ : OracleComp.SampleableType α
inst✝ : DecidableEq α
⊢ Pr[⊥ |
      Nat.recAux (pure (Matrix.of ![]))
        (fun n ihn => do
          let top ← OracleComp.uniformSample (Vector α m) (OracleComp.instSampleableTypeVector α m inst✝¹)
          let bot ← ihn
          pure (Fin.cons top.get bot))
        n] =
    0

proof:
induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ m ih => simp [ih]
failed_attempts:
induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [ih, probFailure_bind_eq_zero, probFailure_uniformSample]

    | succ m ih => simp [ih, probFailure_bind]

    | succ m ih => simp [probFailure_bind, ih]

    | succ m ih =>
      simp [ih, probFailure_bind, probFailure_uniformSample, probFailure_pure]

induction n with

    | succ m ih =>
      rw [probFailure_bind_eq_zero]
      · intro; rw [probFailure_bind_eq_zero]
        · intro; simp
        · exact ih
      · exact probFailure_uniformSample _

induction n with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih, probFailure_bind]

induction n with

      simp only [Nat.rec_add_one]
      rw [probFailure_bind_eq_zero]
      · exact probFailure_uniformSample _
      · intros
        rw [probFailure_bind_eq_zero]
        · exact ih
        · simp

      simp
      refine probFailure_bind_eq_zero (probFailure_uniformSample _) (fun _ _ ↦ ?_)
      refine probFailure_bind_eq_zero ih (fun _ _ ↦ ?_)
      simp

induction n with
    | zero => simp

      simp [ih, probFailure_bind_eq_zero, probFailure_uniformSample]

induction n with

induction n with

induction n with

    | succ n ih => simp [ih, probFailure_bind]

induction n with

      simp

      · simp

        intros
